data.title: Desert Financial donates $1.425 million to Phoenix Children's 1 Darn Cool School to help hospitalized students academically.
data.description: A recent charitable contribution in Phoenix, dated January 30, 2026, is supporting hospitalized students in staying focused on their academics. Justin Ramirez, who was diagnosed with leukemia at 13 years old, spent significant time at Phoenix Children's hospital for treatment. The donation aims to assist students like Justin in continuing their education while receiving medical care. This initiative is crucial for ensuring that young patients can stay on track with their studies despite health challenges and extended hospital stays.

data.title: Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) declares $0.30 quarterly dividend per share on common stock; payable to shareholders on March 11.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $0.30 per share for its common stock. Shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 11, 2026 will receive the dividend on March 11, 2026.

data.title: Blue Origin, owned by Jeff Bezos, halts space tourism aboard New Shepard rocket for 2 years to focus on Moon missions instead.
data.description: Blue Origin's New Shepard rocket, known for carrying 92 individuals on suborbital spaceflights, will be grounded for a minimum of 24 months. This decision comes as the company shifts focus towards fulfilling lucrative NASA agreements.

data.title: PETTINGELL professionals named Coldwell Banker Realty's No. 1 duo in the nation for the second year in a row.
data.description: PETTINGELL PROFESSIONALS have been recognized as the number one duo in the nation by COLDWELL BANKER REALTY for the second consecutive year. This prestigious title was announced on January 30, 2026. The achievement underscores their exceptional performance in the real estate industry. This marks a significant accomplishment for PETTINGELL PROFESSIONALS, showcasing their dedication and success. The duo's outstanding work has solidified their position as leaders in the field. Their consistent excellence has set a high benchmark for others in the industry, demonstrating their commitment to delivering top-tier service. This recognition highlights their unparalleled success and professionalism, setting them apart as the top-performing duo nationwide.

data.title: Peoples Financial Services Corp. releases unaudited Q4 and full year 2025 earnings. NASDAQ: PFIS.
data.description: In Moosic, Pennsylvania, on January 30, 2026, Peoples Financial Services Corp. (NASDAQ: PFIS), the parent company of Peoples Security Bank and Trust Company, released their unaudited financial results for the three months and full year ending.

data.title: Rocket Doctor AI Inc. hires Danayi Capital for digital marketing services at $125,000 for a 2-month term starting Feb 9, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, on January 30, 2026, Rocket Doctor AI Inc. (CSE: AIDR, OTC: AIRDF, Frankfurt: 939) has revealed its partnership with Danayi Capital Corp. for digital marketing services. The agreement spans a two-month period starting from February 9, 2026. Rocket Doctor AI will compensate Danayi with an initial payment of USD$125,000 for these services.

data.title: Nasdaq rises as Powell sees improving outlook; Tesla surges. Dow Jones wavers. Tesla earnings due late. Fed holds key rate steady.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed instability as it fluctuated on Wednesday following the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain its key interest rate. Tesla is set to release its earnings report later in the day. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq experienced a rise in value as Federal Reserve Chairman Powell expressed optimism about the economy's trajectory. Tesla's stock saw a significant surge amid these updates.

data.title: Partnership formed for lithium battery safety education; Clean Energy Canada involved. Watertown, Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: A recent partnership between Packaging And Crating Technologies and a renowned Canadian tech institute aims to offer tailored education on lithium battery safety. The collaboration, announced on January 30, 2026, in Watertown, Conn., signifies a crucial move towards enhancing safety protocols in handling lithium batteries. As per Clean Energy Canada, a leading nonprofit organization driving the country's clean energy initiatives, this initiative comes at a critical time. The specialized program targets to educate individuals on safe lithium battery handling practices, set to benefit a significant number of stakeholders in the industry.

data.title: Challenge Island®, a top STEM/STEAM program, ranked on Entrepreneur Magazine's Franchise 500® for the 9th year; 170+ locations in 36 states and Canada.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 30, 2026, Challenge Island®, a leading STEM/STEAM program, was recognized as a top franchise opportunity by Entrepreneur Magazine. The program boasts over 170 locations across 36 states and in Canada. This acknowledgment was part of Entrepreneur Magazine's 2026 Franchise rankings, solidifying Challenge Island's position as a lucrative business venture in the educational sector.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig ranked as a top trademark firm in WTR 1000 2026 edition with 30 recommended attorneys.
data.description: The international legal entity Greenberg Traurig, LLP has recently received acknowledgment from the World Trademark Review (WTR) in its 16th edition of the WTR 1000, with national and regional recognitions. Along with the firm's overall achievements, WTR particularly highlighted 30 lawyers within Greenberg Traurig.

data.title: Symmetry Systems introduces AI-powered features, taxonomy with data identifiers, types, and plans open source release.
data.description: Symmetry Systems, based in San Mateo, California, has introduced a range of advanced AI-driven capabilities and a taxonomy that seamlessly incorporates sensitive data identifiers, data types, and privacy frameworks. The company aims to enhance vendor conformity and foster collaboration within the industry with an upcoming open-source release. This move is anticipated to bolster consistency across vendors and encourage a unified approach within the sector. The announcement was made on January 30, 2026.
